audience: Estate agents, property developers, landlords, managers and owners who want to present a property's spatial layout online.
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Makelaars, verhuurders en vastgoedeigenaars helpen bepalen wanneer een 3D-tour past en hoe zij capture, privacy, hosting, metingen, website-integratie en opvolging professioneel plannen.

searchIntent.question: When does a real estate 3D tour add value, and how should capture, privacy, hosting, measurement limits and website publication be planned?
searchIntent.geographicContext: International English-speaking readers, with Belgian and EU privacy context and VisualVibe services based in Limburg, Belgium.

directAnswer: A real estate 3D tour lets prospective buyers or tenants explore how a property's spaces connect. It is useful when layout and circulation influence pre-selection, provided the property, route, privacy, hosting, measurement limits, accessible alternatives and removal date are planned before publication.
title: 3D tour for real estate: from online exploration to viewing
metaDescription: Planning a real estate 3D tour? Compare photos, video and virtual tours, then arrange routes, privacy, hosting, accessibility and measurements in advance.
h1: 3D tour for real estate: from online exploration to viewing
factsToPreserve: A tour does not replace an honest description, photography, floor plan, technical inspection or physical viewing.
US housing research provides context and is not a Belgian guarantee of faster sales.
Marketing capture and technical measurement are separate outputs unless explicitly specified and validated.
A device accuracy specification does not guarantee every viewer measurement or derived file.
Automatic blurring is not a complete privacy control.
Cloud tours may depend on an active platform account and subscription.
The hosting owner, costs, transfer, retention and removal date must be agreed.
Interactive viewers need text, photographs, floor plans and contact as accessible alternatives.
A 3D tour cannot generally be guaranteed to sell or rent property faster.
